description_long: This is a triangular sandwich made with two slices of grilled, whole-grain bread, visibly toasted with grill marks. The sandwich is generously filled with layers of fresh green leafy vegetables, thick slices of tomato, and a spread that appears to be avocado or guacamole. The filling is abundant, causing the sandwich to appear thick and hearty, with some ingredients spilling out from the sides. A wooden toothpick pierces through the center, holding the sandwich together and adding a touch of presentation. The sandwich is served on a white, slightly irregular plate, with no visible packaging or branding.
description: A thick, triangular grilled sandwich with leafy greens, tomato, and avocado spread, held together by a toothpick and served on a white plate.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen from the side, showing the layered filling of greens, tomato, and avocado, with the toothpick clearly visible and the bread's grill marks prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the sandwich, with the tomato slice and avocado spread most visible, and the sandwich's thickness emphasized.
description_view_2: The back view shows the leafy greens spilling out, with the bread's texture and the sandwich's height clearly visible.
description_view_3: This angle displays the sandwich's top and leafy filling, with the toothpick and grill marks on the bread in focus.
